judgment.summary: Micron exhibits explosive growth and strong margins, trading at a very low forward P/E despite high current multiples.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last quarter beat EPS estimate by 33.2%; next earnings date is 2026-06-24.
positives: Revenue growth 196.3% YoY and earnings growth 756.0% YoY indicate massive top-line and bottom-line expansion.
Profit margin 41.5% and operating margin 67.6% are exceptionally high.
Forward P/E of 7.31x is extremely attractive given the rapid growth.
Return on equity 39.8% and return on assets 20.1% show excellent capital efficiency.
Strong analyst consensus ('strong_buy') with a wide range of targets suggests significant upside potential.
negatives: Trailing P/E of 35.50x and Price/Sales of 14.57x are high, suggesting current valuation is based on future expectations.
Debt/Equity ratio of 14.90 is high, although offset by substantial cash and free cash flow.
Beta of 1.92 indicates higher volatility than the broader market.
Analyst mean target of $613.23 is below the current spot price, implying a potential short-term pullback.

news.paragraph: Jim Cramer suggested that investors should wait for a better entry point on SanDisk, implying caution around current price levels. This commentary comes as Micron Technology, a related semiconductor player, faces scrutiny. Traders should consider the broader sector sentiment and any potential impact from analyst commentary on valuation.

headlines.title: Jim Cramer on Sandisk: “Gotta Let It Come Down More”

examples.body: $MU not selling my stock until December. In other words this will tank to $400 until december and then January $1,500 will magically happen lol
$MU $QQQ looking for a breakout, possibly this Friday
$MU anybody worry about likely double top 800 area?? Red candles tell the story caution is in order ⚠️ ‼️
$MU Think it drops to $400 soon. Then it can continue the run.
@getoutofstocks Thank you. $MU has 12x accumulation and price pressure with only 1/3 the return. Crazy.
